sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement system documented for RPG title

special_mechanics.name: Top-down Overworld Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Players navigate from a top-down perspective on a traversable overworld connecting towns, dungeons, and points of interest

special_mechanics.name: Multiple Traversal Methods
special_mechanics.description: Player can traverse overworld by foot, Chocobo, hydra-guided ship, wind drake, or airship depending on situation

special_mechanics.name: Active Time Battle (ATB) System
special_mechanics.description: Time flows continuously for both player and enemies during combat. Player can see character turn order via ATB Bar gauge that fills according to character speed

physics_values.turn_order: gauge-based fill rate dependent on character speed stat

tier_notes: Final Fantasy V is a turn-based RPG with no documented character movement physics parameters. The game uses top-down perspective navigation and menu-based combat. No jump mechanics, gravity systems, or sub-pixel movement are applicable to this title. Movement is discrete grid-based navigation on overworld and turn-based in combat.
